creator: ehaupt@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

I don't think running update-desktop-database quietly is a good idea. I 
generally like to see the output of what is executed after package 
installation. 

The current pkg-plist is already fine: 

http://people.freebsd.org/~ehaupt/misc/xfce4-notifyd-0.2.2_4.log 

The removal of your additionally added directories is properly handled 
by dependencies which clean them up as well.
